title: Building long-running AI agents with ADK
summary: Google Cloud Tech tutorial on building long-running AI agents using the open source Agent Development Kit (ADK). The tutorial covers the long-running agent pattern with stateless, event-driven architecture and multi-agent delegation patterns.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building long-running AI agents with the open source Agent Development Kit (ADK). It covers the long-running agent pattern built on a stateless, event-driven architecture, along with multi-agent delegation patterns for distributing work across agents. The focus is on the architectural choices (statelessness and event-driven design) that support agents operating over extended durations.
